name: dotdigital Group Plc
summary: dotdigital Group Plc provides intuitive software as a service (SaaS) and managed services to digital marketing professionals worldwide. The company offers Engagement Cloud, a SaaS-based omni-channel marketing automation platform that enables companies to create, test, and send data-driven automated campaigns and communications across channels, such as email, SMS, social, push, etc. dotdigital Group Plc was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
